scoreBoundary: Internal implementation score. Not a Google score and not a ranking prediction.

scoreScale.21_40: Release-blocked; some source foundations exist but live search eligibility is unsafe.
scoreScale.41_60: Partially ready; core templates exist but production/measurement gaps remain.
scoreScale.61_80: Implementation foundation is strong but needs launch evidence and monitoring.
scoreScale.81_100: Release-ready from an implementation perspective, still not a ranking guarantee.

scoringModel.basis: Production robots.txt and sitemap.xml are 404, product sitemap/feed URLs serve HTML, opaque product identifier URL returns 200 without redirect, invalid route returns 200, and private/admin-style routes return 200. Local source contains robots/sitemap/feed files and slug helpers.
Hydrated SPA can route public pages, but raw HTML is a JavaScript-required shell and production HTTP status handling is weak. Local Vite build passes.
Service and product content systems exist, but GBP/citation/business owner evidence and live platform validation remain unavailable.
Local head management exists, but plain crawler view and production asset issues reduce confidence in live metadata/canonical behavior.
Schema policy/source work exists and commerce contract passes locally. Live schema parity and platform enhancement readback remain unavailable.
Core journeys exist, but checkout can render by state without URL navigation and D-4 accessibility/SXO findings are not closed live.

i18n audit, product sitemap, Merchant feed, and commerce contract pass locally. Live Merchant feed is HTML, Search Console/GBP/Merchant Center readback is unavailable, and production product URL migration fails.
Board/governance is strong, but authenticated Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, field CWV, and provider readbacks remain unavailable.

blockerCap.capReason: P0/P1 production blockers prevent the raw weighted live score from representing actual release readiness.

blockers.title: Public/private route boundary is unsafe
blockers.acceptance: Unauthenticated private/admin/account routes return 401, 403, or safe 404 before any private interface renders.

blockers.title: Production SEO static assets and Merchant feed are not deployed correctly
blockers.acceptance: robots.txt returns 200 text/plain; sitemap.xml, product sitemap, and Merchant feed return XML with expected bodies.

blockers.title: Figma Make source and preview parity remain unverified
blockers.acceptance: Figma Make source is patched from local source of truth and preview no longer throws stale import/runtime errors.

blockers.title: Legacy redirects, product identifier redirects, and soft-404 handling are not active on production
blockers.acceptance: Legacy service/catalog/product identifier routes permanently redirect one hop to canonical URLs, while invalid routes return 404 or 410.

blockers.title: Checkout URL/canonical state and deployed commerce parity remain open
blockers.acceptance: Cart checkout navigates to /checkout, checkout stays noindex, and deployed Paytrail price/stock revalidation is read back.

blockers.title: Platform readback is unavailable
blockers.owner: Provider, SEO, local, merchant, and analytics owners
blockers.acceptance: Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, field CWV, Cloudflare, and provider state are read back without secrets.

currentLiveHttpEvidence.interpretation: Homepage is reachable, but raw crawler view is a JavaScript shell.
Apex host redirects to canonical www host.
Opaque product identifier URL does not HTTP redirect to a slug URL.
Invalid route is a production soft-404 risk.
Admin/private-style route is publicly reachable and must be protected at HTTP/runtime boundary.
Robots file is not deployed at production URL.
Primary sitemap is not deployed at production URL.
Product sitemap route serves HTML instead of XML.
Merchant feed route serves HTML instead of XML.

currentLocalVerification.command: /Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Return only: pass/fail, build output directory, warnings/errors count, and any fatal error lines for the Mitra Auto Vite build. Do not include repetitive chunk lists." -- npm run build
currentLocalVerification.note: Build passed with one large chunk warning.
Product sitemap check passed: 60918 URLs across 2 files.
Schema, cart, checkout, and product mapping use shared commerce snapshot.
Non-secret project metadata confirmed; database URL presence reported as set only.
Project-specific Supabase MCP points at rcmmbwdebnmicrweoiyz.

fastestScoreLifts.title: Public/private boundary and CMS route protection
fastestScoreLifts.why: Removes P0 public/private risk and lets private route status policy pass.

fastestScoreLifts.title: Production static SEO assets and Merchant feed deployment parity
fastestScoreLifts.why: Restores robots, sitemap discovery, product sitemap, and Merchant Center feed eligibility.

fastestScoreLifts.title: HTTP redirect, product ID migration, and soft-404 remediation
fastestScoreLifts.why: Makes slug migration real at HTTP level and removes duplicate/soft-404 crawl waste.

fastestScoreLifts.title: Checkout URL, canonical, and deployed Paytrail parity
fastestScoreLifts.why: Improves commerce trust and product SEO consistency.

fastestScoreLifts.title: Authenticated provider and platform readback
fastestScoreLifts.why: Turns unavailable Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, and provider evidence into audited facts.

nextRecommendedWork: Continue with R-1 - Public/private boundary and CMS route protection.
